roles.title: Data Research Intern
responsibilities: Consolidated multi-source market and customer data into structured datasets for repeatable analysis and reporting.
Built bottom-up / parameterized TAM and demand models for GTM planning and investment memos.
Produced regional penetration analyses and heat maps to support expansion prioritization.
Analyzed business health and unit economics metrics including margins and turnover.
Conducted competitive intelligence and customer research using public sources, surveys, and interviews.
Delivered executive-style readouts linking analysis to pricing, positioning, rollout, and growth decisions.

roles.title: Data Science Intern
responsibilities: Built geo-based retention cohorts to diagnose adoption differences across US and China users.
Segmented cohorts by customer persona and workflow to identify feature adoption patterns and churn drivers.
Defined and tracked D1/D7 retention and feature adoption KPIs.
Partnered with Product to redesign advanced filtering UX using insight-led labels and clearer framing.
Built and maintained recurring monitoring dashboards for retention and feature adoption.

roles.title: Head of Career and Community Development
responsibilities: Led a 15-member team delivering networking and career events.
Managed venue, logistics, promotion, outreach, and partnership coordination.
Tracked targets and sub-team performance in Excel.
